description: Permission audit: menu visibility vs route guard vs backend @Roles per module

modules.name: auth
modules.notes: login/refresh @Public(), logout/me JWT-only. No mismatch.

modules.name: tenants
modules.notes: Fully consistent.

modules.name: users
modules.notes: Backend also allows super_admin for management purposes — no UI mismatch.

modules.name: units
modules.notes: GET /units is globally readable (intentional). No 403 risk.

modules.name: categories
modules.notes: Backend widens read to cashier/waiter for order-creation flows, but they have no direct /categories page — intentional.

modules.name: products
modules.notes: Same as categories — read widens for order creation. No page-level mismatch.

modules.name: cash-registers
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: movements
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: customers
modules.notes: Cashier can search/create customers via order flow endpoints — no /customers page access needed.

modules.name: orders

bugs.description: WAITER excluded from GET /orders — service already filters but controller blocked first
bugs.fix: Added ROLES.WAITER to @Roles on findAll in orders.controller.ts

bugs.description: DELIVERY excluded from GET /orders — delivery orders view called this endpoint
bugs.fix: Added ROLES.DELIVERY to @Roles on findAll in orders.controller.ts

modules.notes: Service filters: waiter → own orders only; delivery → delivery-type orders only.

modules.name: tables
modules.notes: Read is intentionally wide (kitchen/delivery also need table info). Writes restricted to management.

modules.name: kitchen
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: delivery

bugs.description: DELIVERY role could navigate to /delivery/persons and call GET /delivery-persons → 403
bugs.fix: Added canActivate: [roleGuard(OWNER, ADMIN, CASHIER)] to /persons child route in delivery/routes.ts

bugs.description: delivery-orders-view.component.ts called loadPersons() unconditionally → DELIVERY role got 403 on GET /delivery-persons on page load. Also showed 'Asignar' button to delivery users who can't call PATCH /orders/:id/assign
bugs.fix: Injected AuthService, added canManage computed (owner|admin|cashier), guarded loadPersons() call and 'Asignar' button with canManage()

modules.notes: Delivery users see only their order queue and status-transition buttons. Person management and assignment is now correctly restricted to owner/admin/cashier.

modules.name: payments

bugs.description: order-detail.component.ts showed 'Cobrar' and 'Completar' buttons to WAITER (canPay/canComplete only checked order status, not role). Clicking either called POST /orders/:id/payments or PATCH /orders/:id/complete → 403
bugs.fix: Added role !== 'waiter' check inside canPay and canComplete computed signals in order-detail.component.ts

modules.notes: WAITER can view order detail but cannot initiate payment — intentional business rule, now enforced in UI.

modules.name: suppliers
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: purchases
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: inventory
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: notifications
modules.notes: User-scoped at service layer: each user sees only their own notifications.

modules.name: audit-logs
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

modules.name: reports
modules.notes: Class-level @Roles. Fully consistent.

bugsFixed: BUG-1: WAITER blocked from GET /orders — backend role missing (orders.controller.ts)
BUG-2: DELIVERY blocked from GET /orders — backend role missing (orders.controller.ts)
BUG-3: DELIVERY could navigate to /delivery/persons sub-route and get 403 (delivery/routes.ts)
BUG-4: WAITER saw Cobrar/Completar buttons in order-detail but payments backend rejects waiter (order-detail.component.ts)
BUG-5: delivery-orders-view loaded GET /delivery-persons unconditionally; DELIVERY role got 403 on page load; Asignar button shown to delivery users (delivery-orders-view.component.ts)
